videoSnippet.title: Remember The Storm of The Century? || Nodirbek Abdusattorov vs Gukesh || Prague Chess Festival 2026

Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2751) - Gukesh D (2754)
Prague International Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.03.01
A22 English opening

1.c4 e5 2.Nc3 Nf6 3.e3 Bb4 4.Nge2 d5 5.cxd5 Nxd5 6.Qb3 Nxc3 7.Qxb4 Nd5 8.Qb3 Nc6 9.Nc3 Ndb4 10.Bc4 Nd3+ 11.Ke2 Nf4+ 12.Kf1 Ne6 13.Qd1 b6 14.b4 Bb7 15.a3 Qh4 16.d3 O-O-O 17.Bb2 Ng5 18.h3 f5 19.Rc1 Kb8 20.Nd5 Rd7 21.Qc2 Re8 22.f3 Qh6 23.Kf2 Qh4+ 24.Kf1 Ne6 25.Nc3 Qh6 26.Qf2 g5 27.Kg1 Qg6 28.Ne2 a6 29.h4 g4 30.h5 Qh6 31.fxg4 fxg4 32.Ng3 b5 33.Bxe6 Rxe6 34.Qe2 Nd8 35.Rh4 Rg7 36.e4 Qg5 37.Nf5 Rg8 38.Rf1 Nc6 39.Bc1 Nd4 40.Qd1 Qd8 41.Rxg4 Rxg4 42.Qxg4 Bc8 43.Be3 Nxf5 44.exf5 Rf6 45.Qe4 Qd7 46.Qxe5 Rxf5 47.Rxf5 Qxf5 48.Qd4 Be6 49.h6 Bd5 50.Bf2 Kb7 51.Qa7+ Kc8 52.Bg3 Qd7 53.Qc5 Qc6 54.Qf8+ Kb7 55.Qg7 Qc2 56.Bf4 Kc8 57.Kh2 Kb7 58.Bd6 Kc8 59.Be5 Kb7 60.d4 Kc8 61.Kh3 Kb7 62.g4 Qg2+ 63.Kh4 Qf2+ 64.Kg5 Qc2 65.Bf4 Kc8 66.Qe5 Qg6+ 67.Kh4 Qf7 68.g5 Bf3 69.g6

04:00 CNG
